title: Tough As Nails - More Compatibility
description: This datapack adds compatibility between TAN the Tough As Nails mod and a variety of food and drink items from other popular mods.
body:
This datapack adds compatibility between the [Tough As Nails](https://modrinth.com/mod/tough-as-nails) mod and a variety of food and drink items from other popular mods.

Adds heating and cooling when consumed to some items\
Adds hydration and thirst values to mods below\
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a2c173500257c6170fdfe5e5c36d693c1bdbdfdd.png)

**Supported mods:**
- [Croptopia](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/croptopia)  
- [Farmer’s Expanse](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-expanse)  
- [Christmas Delight (Farmer’s Delight Addon)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/christmas-delight)  
- [Compat Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/compat-delight)  
- [Expanded Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/expanded-delight)  
- [Ends Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/ends-delight)  
- [Ender’s Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/enders-delight)  
- [Fruits Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/fruits-delight)  
- [Brewin’ and Chewin’](https://modrinth.com/mod/brewin-and-chewin)  
- [Drink Beer Refill](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/drink-beer-refill)  
- [Dumplings Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/dumplings-delight)  
- [Cultural Delights](https://modrinth.com/mod/cultural-delights)  
- [Ube’s Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/ubes-delight)  
- [Rustic Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/rustic-delight)  
- [Ars Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/arsdelight)  
- [Youkai’s Homecoming](https://modrinth.com/mod/youkaishomecoming)  
- [The Bumblezone](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-bumblezone))  
- [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)  
- [Create Confectionery](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-confectionery)
